symptom_description: Hermetic compressor making severe unusual internal clattering buzzing/humming. Suction and discharge pressures equalized while running.
root_cause: Single-phasing or severe voltage dip on incoming feed damaged hermetic compressor start winding.
action_taken: Replaced start and run capacitors along with potential relay; tested hermetic compressor windings (`resistance OK`) and successfully restarted unit.
parts_used: Replacement Hermetic Refrigeration Compressor Assembly, Bi-Flow Filter Drier, R-134a Charge (6 lbs)

symptom_description: Dryer refrigeration compressor hot to touch (`77`°C) and tripping on low suction pressure cutoff during afternoon shift.
root_cause: Degraded Schrader access valve core O-ring allowed slow loss of R-134a/R-407C refrigerant charge over past 6 months.
action_taken: Recovered remaining refrigerant charge, repaired cracked capillary tube brazed joint with 15% silver solder, evacuated to 500 microns, and weighed in factory charge of R-134a.
parts_used: R-407C Refrigerant Charge (8 lbs), Hermetic Filter Drier, Copper Tubing Section

symptom_description: Air dryer dew point gauge reading `113`°C (high dew point alarm active). Suction pressure on refrigerant compressor reading near `0` PSI.
root_cause: Vibration fatigue cracked copper capillary tube at brazed connection to hot gas bypass valve manifold.
action_taken: Repaired pinhole braze leak at evaporator inlet header, installed new bi-flow filter drier, and charged unit with precise weight of R-134a.
parts_used: R-407C Refrigerant Charge (8 lbs), Hermetic Filter Drier, Copper Tubing Section

symptom_description: Dryer refrigeration compressor hot to touch (`98`°C) and tripping on low suction pressure cutoff during afternoon shift.
root_cause: Corrosion pinhole developed inside air-to-refrigerant heat exchanger due to acidic condensate accumulation.
action_taken: Replaced leaking Schrader valve cores and service caps, pulled deep vacuum to verify holding, and recharged refrigerant to nameplate specification.
parts_used: Filter Drier Core Assembly, Braze Alloy, R-134a Refrigerant Bottle

symptom_description: Compressor short cycling on low-pressure cutout switch. Tech observed severe oil residue on copper brazed joint near evaporator.
root_cause: Fretting wear between rubbing copper refrigerant lines inside cabinet wore through tubing wall over time.
action_taken: Located leak using electronic leak detector, repaired rubbed copper tubing section, replaced liquid line filter drier, evacuated system, and recharged with R-407C.
parts_used: R-134a Refrigerant (5 lbs), Liquid Line Filter Drier, 15% Silver Braze Rods

symptom_description: Hermetic compressor making severe heavy internal clattering thumping. Suction and discharge pressures equalized while running. Suspect binding or restriction here caused elevated current draw on COMP-201.
root_cause: Mechanical seizure of hermetic scroll/reciprocating compressor internal bearings due to prolonged loss of oil return from system.
action_taken: Replaced start and run capacitors along with potential relay; tested hermetic compressor windings (`resistance OK`) and successfully restarted unit.
parts_used: Compressor Run Capacitor 45uF, Start Relay Kit, Contactor

symptom_description: Ops noted heavy liquid water spray when blowing down downstream pneumatic regulator bowls. Dryer separator drain stuck closed.
root_cause: Accumulation of rust scales, pipe dope, and oily emulsion sludge clogged inlet strainer of electronic zero-loss drain valve.
action_taken: Replaced jammed internal float assembly with upgraded heavy-duty electronic zero-loss condensate drain trap and flushed separator bowl.
parts_used: Automatic Drain Rebuild Kit, Separator Bowl Gasket

symptom_description: Air dryer dew point gauge reading `86`°C (high dew point alarm active). Suction pressure on refrigerant compressor reading near `0` PSI.
root_cause: Vibration fatigue cracked copper capillary tube at brazed connection to hot gas bypass valve manifold.
action_taken: Located leak using electronic leak detector, repaired rubbed copper tubing section, replaced liquid line filter drier, evacuated system, and recharged with R-407C.
parts_used: R-407C Refrigerant Charge (8 lbs), Hermetic Filter Drier, Copper Tubing Section

action_taken: Replaced failed compressor start kit (capacitor + relay), checked contactor tips, and verified smooth compressor running draw (`6.5 Amps`).
parts_used: Hard Start Capacitor Kit, Compressor Contactor 24V

root_cause: Internal discharge valve reed fracture inside hermetic shell causing complete loss of pumping capacity.
action_taken: Replaced internal hermetic refrigeration compressor assembly, installed new suction/liquid line filter driers, pulled deep vacuum, and recharged system.
parts_used: Replacement Hermetic Refrigeration Compressor Assembly, Bi-Flow Filter Drier, R-134a Charge (6 lbs)

root_cause: Mechanical seizure of hermetic scroll/reciprocating compressor internal bearings due to prolonged loss of oil return from system.
action_taken: Replaced internal hermetic refrigeration compressor assembly, installed new suction/liquid line filter driers, pulled deep vacuum, and recharged system.

symptom_description: Refrigeration compressor tripped internal thermal overload switch. Hermetic shell burning hot (`93`°C) with zero cooling output.
root_cause: Electrical burnout of compressor start/run capacitor (`capacitance measured 0 uF vs 45 uF rating`) preventing motor start.
action_taken: Recovered refrigerant, cut out mechanically seized hermetic compressor, brazed in exact replacement compressor and filter drier, evacuated, and weighed in fresh R-134a charge.
parts_used: Compressor Run Capacitor 45uF, Start Relay Kit, Contactor
